titleStmt.title: SII 41.267: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 267. (A.R. No. 484 of 1905.) Tiruvālaṅgāḍu, Tiruttani Taluk, Chittoor District. On the third gōpura of the Vataranyesvara temple at Tiruvalangadu, right of entrance.

p.hi: Chōḻa, Rājakēsarivarman Kulōttuṅga I, Year 46 = 1116 A.D.

summary.p: Damaged and incomplete. Sale of land to the temple at Tiruvālaṅgāḍu in Naḍuvilma[lai] by the sabhā of Rājanārāyaṇa-chaturvedimangalam in Naḍuvilmalai-Perumūr-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyiṟ ciṟanta maṇimuṭi cūṭi minavaṉilaitara villavar kulaitara Eṉaimaṉṉavar Iriyaluṟṟiḻitarattikkaṉaittun
taṉcakkaranaṭātti virasimhāsanattu Ulaka muḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟirun=taruḷiya kovirājakesari panmarāna cakravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 4 10 1āvatu je
yaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu naṭuvilmalaiāḷuṭaiyār tiruvālaṅkāṭuṭaiyaārkku Uṭaiyār nampiviḷākattil kiṟ tiruṉantavaṉa puṟamākavum kūḻappi
ṭāṟkku tiruvālaṅkāṭṭātidāsa caṇṭeśvaradevarvilaiyāka jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu naṭuvilmalaip perumurnāṭṭu rājanārāyaṇaccatur vetimaṅkalattu
sabhaiyom Emmilicain=ta vilaipporuḷ Āvaṇakkaḷiye(k) kiḻikaiccelakkoṇṭu ṉāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭutta nilattu Eṅkaḷūr Eri Etirvāyil nakaruṭaiyān maṭappu
ṟattukku vaṭakkum kūḷipāṭi Ellaikku veḷḷa maṭuk kiḻakku nokkit tirin=ta catirattukku teṟku Immaṭuvi niṉṟum patiṉ kol Aṟṟa kokkavum nokki muṉpu
n nakaruṭaiyāṉ maṭappuṟattukku vaṭakkum naṭuvupaṭṭanilattil veḷ maṭuvūkkuk kiḻakkum kūḻapiṭāraṟkkum Immaṭuvu naṉtavanappuṟamumākavum Innilattukkuk kuṟutuṟai nirpā
yvatākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu Āvaṇakkaḷiye kiḻikaicelakkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytu kuṭuttom Iṉnila Epperpaṭṭa ppomakaccamma
tittu viṟṟukkuṭuttom Orukālāvatu mirukālāvatu mukkālāvatu viṟṟukkuṭuttom Ippaṭi cempiluṅ kallilum
viṟṟukkuṭuttom Ivai paṇiyāl Ivvūr kaṇakkaṉ sā yaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku
Digital edition of SII 41.267 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
